Who Owns the Future of Homeownership? Ex: Overview Entry-level homeownership is becoming increasingly out of reach in high-cost markets, not only because of rising prices but because the system that supports access is fragmented. This conversation brings together leaders across the housing ecosystem to examine how capital, program design, innovation, research, and regional economic forces collectively shape who can access ownership.
